mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_monitor ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_monitor (metric_name, metric_value, metric_unit, create_time) VALUES (#{metricName}, #{metricValue}, #{metricUnit}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM api_metric ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_metric (api_path, method, response_time, status_code, create_time) VALUES (#{apiPath}, #{method}, #{responseTime}, #{statusCode}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sandbox_status ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sandbox_status (container_id, status, cpu_usage, memory_usage, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{containerId}, #{status}, #{cpuUsage}, #{memoryUsage}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO system_log (level, category, message, stack_trace, create_time) VALUES (#{level}, #{category}, #{message}, #{stackTrace}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_config WHERE enabled = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_config (metric_name, threshold, operator, alert_level, enabled, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{metricName}, #{threshold}, #{operator}, #{alertLevel}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO alert_record (config_id, metric_value, message, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{configId}, #{metricValue}, #{message}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
